column2:
(All crafting is using the best optimal setup and stats, you can find all of this below)
1.Add your current auction house prices to all fields in Milling including a star (*). 
2.Add your current auction house prices to Apricate Ink fields including a star (*). All other fields are using information from the Milling step before.
3.If you want to make Ciphers, add your current auction house prices to Boundless Cipher fields including a star (*). All other fields is using information from the Milling
& Apricate Ink step before, so make sure you have input that data.
4.Make sure you use the double amount of mycobloom as luredrop
(DO NOT USE Q1 HERBS TO GET Q2 PIGMENTS. IT YIELDS LESS PIGMENTS)
column8:
(All crafting is using the best optimal setup and stats, you can find all of this below)
1.Add your current auction house prices to all fields in Milling including a star (*). 
2.Add your current auction house prices to Shadow Ink fields including a star (*). All other fields are using information from the Milling step before.
3.If you want to make Greenwood, add your current auction house prices to Codified Greenwood fields including a star (*). All other fields is using information from the Milling 
& Shadow Ink step before, so make sure you have input that data.
(DO NOT USE Q1 HERBS TO GET Q2 PIGMENTS. IT YIELDS LESS PIGMENTS)
